candidates.why: Exact revenue line and preferred top-line measure; matches Net Sales values and is in candidate list.

variables.notes: Selected the single reported revenue line as priority choice.

candidates.why: Candidate list provides this, but it is clearly acquisition-related and non-operating, not cost of goods sold.
This exact row appears in the preview and is the clear direct cost line corresponding to COGS.

variables.notes: Candidate list missed the correct COGS label. Chose exact A-column row 'Costs of goods sold' from the preview instead. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Costs of goods sold

candidates.why: Clear overhead component and valid SG&A-type expense; candidate list includes it.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Contains R&D-related amortization, which should be excluded from SG&A components under the rules.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization/R&D-related line; not appropriate SG&A overhead component.
Closest operating overhead bucket outside candidate list; however wording mixes income and expenses, so less clean than personnel costs.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row exists. Selected the best clear overhead component, excluding D&A and R&D amortization. Did not select 'Other operating income and expenses' because it mixes income and expense and may contain non-overhead items.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related label, but it is amortization rather than a dedicated current-period R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, not a dedicated operating R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset rollforward item, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense row appears on the income statement. The visible R&D-related rows are amortization/supplemental or balance-sheet asset lines, so XRD is left empty.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost total; usable if granular recurring components are unavailable, but components exist here.
Direct interest expense line and preferred core recurring financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component on lease liabilities; should be included with interest expense when using components.
Potential recurring finance cost component; included only if not clearly one-off and when summing granular finance costs.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid double counting versus main line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost components instead of total 'Financial expenses'. Excluded FX and fair value items, and excluded the supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best match because BE should exclude non-controlling interests when possible.
Contains NCI and is therefore less preferred when parent-only equity is available.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent label and appears to duplicate the NCI line across years; suitable fallback.
Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement total, not balance sheet minority equity.
OCI/comprehensive allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet NCI labels as priority list to handle label variation across years.
